title: Spooky Music Trader
description: Adds a new trader mansion, along with a collection of spooky tradable music discs
body:
![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c698e7b7e928c1356b641b6c539db9c95cc71e7.png)

This mod introduces the Trader Mansion, a structure that spawns only in Dark Forest biomes.

Spooky Music Discs can be obtained by trading Monster Loot with the mansion's traders.
A new Album item is added, allowing you to store all your music discs in one place.
